title: The Factory Must Thrive
body:
A simple skeleton of a tech mod that is a framework for use with Multiblocked2: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/multiblocked2

 

So far it adds a few machines that don't do anything without Multibocked

 

You can use this mod for making your own multiblocks or you could use CraftTweaker to change recipes and make it fit into a modpack! The choice is yours.

 

I'll be regularaly updating this for the next month or two, but then I'll take feature requests for stuff you guys want me to add.

 

Good luck and happy crafting!
